name: Velvet Rhythm
explanation: A warm boutique preset-rhythm box in the Roland CR-78 CompuRhythm lineage. Unlike a pad-per-drum kit, this is a preset PATTERN player: hold a note and it starts an internal 16-step groove layering a warm rounded bass drum, a soft tonal snare, a sizzly metallic hi-hat, the signature inharmonic twin-square metallic beat, a woody conga and a papery maraca, all synthesised in real time; release to stop and let the tails ring. Controls: Tone (drum pitch), Decay, Snap (snare noise vs body), Metal (metallic-beat / hat brightness and ring), Accent and Level.
